title: Pocket Network Shannon Actor
description: Schema describing the three on-chain actor types — Application, Supplier, Gateway — registered on the Shannon protocol. Each stakes POKT to participate in the relay economy.

Application.description: An Application stakes POKT to consume relays from suppliers for one or more services. Minimum stake is 100 POKT.

service_configs.description: Services the application can consume relays for.

delegatee_gateway_addresses.description: Gateway addresses the application has delegated relay signing authority to.

pending_undelegations.description: Pending undelegations by session end height.

Supplier.description: A Supplier stakes POKT and runs a RelayMiner to serve relays for the services it supports. Earns POKT proportional to validated relay volume.

owner_address.description: Bech32 Shannon address that owns the supplier stake.

operator_address.description: Bech32 Shannon address of the operator (may equal owner_address).

services.description: Services this supplier serves, with endpoint URLs and revenue-share splits.

service_config_history.description: Per-session history of service configurations for this supplier.

Gateway.description: A Gateway stakes POKT (minimum 1 POKT) and is authorized by Applications via delegation to sign relays on their behalf. Gateways typically run PATH.

address.description: Bech32 Shannon address of the gateway.

endpoints.description: RelayMiner endpoint URLs that proxy this service.

Coin.description: Cosmos SDK coin amount. POKT amounts use the 'upokt' denom (1 POKT = 1e6 upokt).
